readings.Aries: The plan is good. The execution will require improvisation. That part, you were made for. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Taurus: Your patience is remarkable. Your patience is also a place you sometimes hide. What worked before will not work the same way this time.
readings.Gemini: There is a thread you dropped three weeks ago that still leads somewhere worth going. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Cancer: The dream you're not taking seriously is the dream you should take seriously. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Leo: You want the room. You also sometimes want to be unknown. Both are real. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Virgo: You've been in service mode for long enough that you've forgotten what you wanted. Remember. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Libra: Something in your life has drifted out of alignment. Your instinct for it is excellent. Trust it. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Scorpio: The thing you've been orbiting without naming — name it today, even if only to yourself. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Sagittarius: You've been framing a limitation as a cage. Most cages are actually just rooms with closed doors. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Capricorn: Your work ethic is not in question. Your relationship to rest is the variable. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Aquarius: There's loneliness in always being slightly ahead. Acknowledge it. It doesn't make you less visionary. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Pisces: Something in your imagination has been trying to become real. The obstacle is the translation. Start translating. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
